1.name: Magical Tinkering
1.summary: Imbue tiny objects with minor magical effects and utility enchantments.

1.name: Spellcasting
1.summary: Use tools and infused craft to prepare and cast artificer spells.

2.name: Infuse Item
2.summary: Turn mundane equipment into useful magic items with repeatable infusions.

1.name: Rage
1.summary: Enter a battle fury that boosts damage and hardens you against harm.

1.name: Unarmored Defense
1.summary: Your physical toughness contributes to AC even without armor.

2.name: Reckless Attack
2.summary: Attack with ferocity for advantage at the risk of opening yourself up.

1.name: Bardic Inspiration
1.summary: Bolster allies with inspiration dice fueled by your performance and presence.

1.name: Spellcasting
1.summary: Channel magic through music, story, and force of personality.

2.name: Jack of All Trades
2.summary: Add half proficiency to many checks where you lack training.

1.name: Spellcasting
1.summary: Prepare divine spells each day through your faith and service.

1.name: Divine Domain
1.summary: Choose the sacred portfolio that shapes your miracles and training.

2.name: Channel Divinity
2.summary: Call directly on divine power for potent domain effects.

1.name: Druidic
1.summary: Learn the secret language and signs of druids.

1.name: Spellcasting
1.summary: Prepare nature magic shaped by primal balance and wisdom.

2.name: Wild Shape
2.summary: Assume beast forms for scouting, survival, or combat.

1.name: Fighting Style
1.summary: Adopt a combat discipline that grants an ongoing battlefield benefit.

1.name: Second Wind
1.summary: Use a burst of stamina to regain hit points as a bonus action.

2.name: Action Surge
2.summary: Push beyond normal limits and take one additional action on your turn.

1.name: Martial Arts
1.summary: Blend speed, discipline, and technique into unarmed combat.

1.name: Unarmored Defense
1.summary: Move freely while Wisdom and Dexterity support your AC.

2.name: Ki
2.summary: Spend ki points on speed, defense, and bursts of precise action.

1.name: Divine Sense
1.summary: Detect celestial, fiendish, and undead presence through holy awareness.

1.name: Lay on Hands
1.summary: Heal wounds and purge certain afflictions through sacred power.

2.name: Fighting Style
2.summary: Adopt disciplined martial training suited to your oath.

1.name: Favored Enemy
1.summary: Study specific foes and better track or understand them.

1.name: Natural Explorer
1.summary: Travel efficiently and lead others through the wilderness.

2.name: Spellcasting
2.summary: Draw on primal magic to support hunting, survival, and battle.

1.name: Expertise
1.summary: Double your proficiency in key trained skills or tools.

1.name: Sneak Attack
1.summary: Exploit openings for precise and devastating damage.

2.name: Cunning Action
2.summary: Use quick tactical movement as a bonus action each turn.

1.name: Spellcasting
1.summary: Innate magic flows through you without need for study or prayer.

1.name: Sorcerous Origin
1.summary: The source of your power shapes your body and your spellcraft.

2.name: Font of Magic
2.summary: Convert sorcery points into flexible spellcasting potential.

1.name: Otherworldly Patron
1.summary: Your pact grants magic from a being beyond the ordinary world.

1.name: Pact Magic
1.summary: Cast a small number of potent spells through your patron's gift.

2.name: Eldritch Invocations
2.summary: Learn specialized mystical techniques that alter your magic.

1.name: Spellcasting
1.summary: Prepare wizard spells from your spellbook and cast them using Intelligence.

1.name: Arcane Recovery
1.summary: Recover part of your expended spell power during a short rest once each day.

2.name: Arcane Tradition
2.summary: Choose the magical discipline that shapes your studies and future features.
